title: Phase 3 PDF corpus label
description: Ground-truth label for a single PDF in the master-plan §3 acceptance corpus. Every PDF in tests/fixtures/phase3_pdf_corpus/<profile>/ must have a sibling <filename>.label.json matching this schema.

filename.description: Bare filename (no path); must match the actual PDF in the same directory.

profile.description: The ground-truth profile classification. Acceptance test verifies the profiler agrees.

expected_page_count.description: Number of pages in the PDF as opened by Adobe Reader / pypdfium2.

expected_recommended_action.description: What silver.document_ingestion_quality.recommended_action should resolve to after ingest.

expected_silver_review_page_count.description: How many rows the ingest should create in silver.low_confidence_page_reviews for this pdf_id.

review_page_reasons.description: Map of page-number-as-string → review reason. Used by acceptance test to verify per-page reasons match. Optional but required when expected_silver_review_page_count > 0.

expected_native_page_count.description: For mixed-profile PDFs: how many pages should be classified native by the page-level profiler.

expected_scanned_page_count.description: For mixed-profile PDFs: how many pages should be classified scanned by the page-level profiler.

expected_table_page_count.description: For table-heavy PDFs: how many pages should be flagged as table-bearing in silver.table_extraction_quality.

notes_for_grader.description: Free-text notes from the SME labeler explaining what makes this PDF interesting for the corpus. Helps the §9.8 classifier corpus later.

labeled_by.description: Name of the SME who labeled the PDF.

labeled_at.description: ISO-8601 date the label was finalized.

source.description: Optional provenance for the source PDF.

skip_reason.description: If a labeled PDF must be excluded from acceptance (e.g. license complaint, content sensitivity), set this. Acceptance test skips the file with this reason logged.
